sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42863" key="e)rwtomane/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρωτο-μᾰνέω</orth>, <sense id="n42863.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐρωμανέω</ref></xr>, Stoic. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.5b9</biblScope> </bibl> (dub.), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:68" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.68</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
